_comment: Maps ReckLabs logical operation names to official Zoho Books MCP tool names. Set official_tool once Zoho publishes official MCP docs.

list_invoices.description: Map to Zoho Books List Invoices tool

create_invoice.description: Map to Zoho Books Create Invoice tool

get_invoice.description: Map to Zoho Books Get Invoice tool

list_customers.description: Map to Zoho Books List Contacts (customers) tool

get_bills.description: Map to Zoho Books List Bills tool
